name: ecai-skills
description: Depth pack for ECAI (European Conference on Artificial Intelligence, EurAI): broad/symbolic and applied-AI routing, the abstract-then-paper two-deadline flow, double-blind review with summary reject and rebuttal, IOS Press FAIA open-access proceedings and the ecai.cls template, the co-located PAIS track, and the joint IJCAI-ECAI 2026 cycle.

plugins.name: ecai-skills
plugins.description: Twelve ECAI-specific skills for the EurAI European Conference on Artificial Intelligence and its IOS Press FAIA open-access proceedings, grounded in the IJCAI-ECAI 2026 call, the ECAI 2024/2023 calls, the FAIA volumes, eurai.org, and dblp.
